title: Hemitomus acutifolius

It belongs to the genus Hemitomus, which is part of the large and diverse family Rubiaceae. The specific classification of Hemitomus acutifolius is as a member of the tribe Psychotrieae. The exact classification of this species is based on morphological and molecular studies of the Rubiaceae family.
